instructions.name: activate_cycle
docs: Permissionless. Transitions RightsWindow → Active once rights_window_end has passed.

instructions.name: buy_tokens
docs: FIX (post-audit): Added max_sol_cost slippage parameter.
Caller passes the maximum total lamports they're willing to spend (including fee);
tx fails if the actual total cost exceeds this. Pass u64::MAX to disable.

accounts.name: project_escrow_token
docs: Project escrow token account

accounts.name: buyer_token
docs: Buyer's token account

instructions.name: claim_rights
docs: Holder submits a Merkle proof to claim their rights allocation.
Verifies the proof against rights_merkle_root, then creates a HolderRights account.
This replaces the creator-driven create_holder_rights for scale deployments.
Leaf hash = SHA-256(0x00 || holder_pubkey || rights_amount_le_bytes)
@param proof        Vec of 32-byte sibling hashes from leaf to root
@param rights_amount Amount of rights tokens the holder is claiming

accounts.name: cycle_state
docs: FIX RA-8: cycle_state is now mut to track rights_allocated

accounts.name: project_state
docs: FIX RA-1: project_state is now mut to clear has_active_cycle flag

accounts.name: sink
docs: FIX RA-6: Dedicated sink PDA — SOL sent here is effectively burned (no withdrawal instruction).

accounts.name: creator
docs: FIX SC-1: Creator must match project_state.creator — SOL always goes to real creator.

accounts.name: authority_config
docs: FIX SC-7: Support authority delegation for close_cycle.
Optional — pass None when caller is creator, Some when caller is operator.

instructions.name: create_holder_rights
docs: Creator-only. Allocates rights to a holder during the RightsWindow.

accounts.name: cycle_state
docs: FIX RA-8: cycle_state is now mut to track rights_allocated

accounts.name: protocol_treasury
docs: Protocol treasury PDA (SOL receiver for fees conceptually; tokens go to token account)

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_token
docs: Token account for protocol treasury

accounts.name: creator_token
docs: Creator token account (receives treasury_allocation)

accounts.name: project_escrow_token
docs: Project escrow token account (holds public_allocation)

accounts.name: reserve
docs: FIX (integration test): Reserve PDA — funded with rent-exempt min during create_project

accounts.name: sink
docs: FIX (integration test): Sink PDA — funded with rent-exempt min during create_project

instructions.name: exercise_rights
docs: FIX (post-audit): Added max_sol_cost slippage parameter.
Caller passes the maximum lamports they're willing to spend; tx fails if
the actual cost exceeds this. Pass u64::MAX to disable the check.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: FIX SC-4: Protocol config needed for fee_bps

accounts.name: protocol_treasury
docs: FIX SC-4: Protocol treasury receives fee SOL

accounts.name: project_escrow_token
docs: Project escrow token account

accounts.name: holder_token
docs: Holder's token account

instructions.name: initialize_authority
docs: Creator-only. Sets up delegated authority for an AI agent or operator.
Principal can be any wallet — human, DAO multisig, or another AI controller.

accounts.name: project_escrow_token
docs: FIX SC-9: Escrow token account needed to validate supply_cap against available tokens

accounts.name: authority_config
docs: Optional — pass None when caller is creator (no AuthorityConfig needed).
Pass Some when caller is an operator — program will verify permission.

instructions.name: reclaim_cycle_rent
docs: FIX F9: Creator can reclaim rent from closed cycle accounts.
Cycle must have been closed for at least 7 days to preserve on-chain history.
Zeroes the account and returns all remaining lamports to creator.

accounts.name: creator
docs: FIX C-1: Creator must sign this instruction — prevents griefing/unauthorized closure

instructions.name: rotate_creator
docs: FIX H6 (round 10): Allow current creator to transfer ownership to a new wallet.
Without this, creator key loss would permanently lock reserve + block future actions.
Must be signed by the CURRENT creator. AuthorityConfig's principal is NOT updated —
operator delegations survive, but new principal must re-issue authority if desired.

accounts.name: authority_config
docs: Optional — pass None when caller is creator, Some when caller is operator.

instructions.name: set_rights_merkle_root
docs: Creator (or authorized operator) sets the Merkle root for rights distribution.
Called after open_cycle, before activate_cycle.
The root commits to a list of (holder_pubkey, rights_amount) pairs computed off-chain.
Holders then claim their rights by submitting a Merkle proof via claim_rights.
@param merkle_root   32-byte SHA-256 Merkle root with domain separation (0x00 leaf, 0x01 node)
@param holder_count  informational count of holders in the snapshot (not verified on-chain)

accounts.name: authority_config
docs: Optional — required when caller is an operator

instructions.name: update_authority
docs: Principal-only. Updates operator permissions or spending limit.

instructions.name: update_protocol_config
docs: Admin-only. Updates protocol fee and default BPS splits.
Allows fixing misconfigurations without redeploying.

instructions.name: withdraw_reserve
docs: FIX C-3 (final audit): Creator withdraws from the reserve PDA.
FIX L-B (round 6): Reserve PDA is System-owned (never init'd with program owner),
so we must use system_program::transfer with invoke_signed. Direct lamport
mutation fails at runtime for System-owned accounts.
Reserve accumulates reserve_bps share of each closed cycle's SOL.
The sink PDA intentionally has NO withdrawal instruction (funds are burned).

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Not authorized

errors.name: HardCapAlreadySet
errors.msg: Hard cap already set — irreversible

errors.name: NotElasticMode
errors.msg: Hard cap only settable for Elastic supply mode

errors.name: NotRightsWindow
errors.msg: Cycle is not in RightsWindow status

errors.name: RightsWindowExpired
errors.msg: Rights window has expired

errors.name: ExceedsRightsAllocation
errors.msg: Exercised amount would exceed rights allocation

errors.name: NotActive
errors.msg: Cycle is not in Active status

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Cycle supply cap reached

errors.name: CycleParamsImmutable
errors.msg: Cycle params immutable once opened

errors.name: ElasticRequiresRights
errors.msg: Elastic supply requires rights-based issuance

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: NotClosed
errors.msg: Cycle is not closed

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ZeroStepSize
errors.msg: Step size cannot be zero

errors.name: RightsWindowStillOpen
errors.msg: Rights window is still open — cannot activate yet

errors.name: LaunchTimeNotReached
errors.msg: Scheduled launch time has not been reached yet

errors.name: MerkleRootNotSet
errors.msg: Merkle root not set for this cycle — call set_rights_merkle_root first

errors.name: InvalidMerkleProof
errors.msg: Merkle proof is invalid — proof does not verify against stored root

errors.name: InsufficientAuthority
errors.msg: Operator lacks permission for this instruction

errors.name: SpendingLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Action exceeds operator spending limit — escalate to principal

errors.name: OperatorNotRegistered
errors.msg: No AuthorityConfig found — call initialize_authority first

errors.name: InvalidBpsSplit
errors.msg: BPS split must sum to 10000 (creator+reserve+sink) and public+protocol fee <= 10000

errors.name: SupplyCapExceedsEscrow
errors.msg: Cycle supply cap exceeds available escrow balance

errors.name: AlreadyDistributed
errors.msg: Funds already distributed for this cycle

errors.name: MerkleRootAlreadySet
errors.msg: Merkle root already set — cannot overwrite after claims have begun

errors.name: CycleStillActive
errors.msg: Cannot open a new cycle while a previous cycle is still active — close it first

errors.name: InvalidRightsWindow
errors.msg: Rights window duration must be between 0 and 30 days (2,592,000 seconds)

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Transaction cost exceeds caller's max_sol_cost slippage cap

errors.name: InsufficientReserveBalance
errors.msg: Withdrawal amount exceeds reserve balance (after rent-exempt minimum)

errors.name: InvalidCurveParam
errors.msg: Invalid curve parameter (e.g., growth_factor_k too large)

errors.name: PurchaseTooLarge
errors.msg: Purchase too large for single tx — split into smaller buys (compute unit limit)

errors.name: RightsPathConflict
errors.msg: Cannot mix legacy create_holder_rights with Merkle-based rights — pick one path

errors.name: InvalidCycleProject
errors.msg: Cycle does not belong to project

errors.name: InvalidProjectMint
errors.msg: Mint does not match project mint

errors.name: InvalidRightsProject
errors.msg: Rights account does not belong to project

errors.name: InvalidRightsCycle
errors.msg: Rights account cycle does not match active cycle

errors.name: InvalidRightsHolder
errors.msg: Rights account holder does not match signer

types.name: AuthorityConfig
docs: On-chain authority delegation for AI agents.
The principal configures what the operator can do autonomously.
Principal can be a human wallet, DAO multisig, or another AI controller — protocol doesn't care.

fields.name: can_set_merkle_root
docs: FIX M-1 (round 5): Separate permission for setting Merkle root.
Previously reused can_open_cycle, letting an operator set malicious rights trees.
NOTE (H-A round 6): Adding this field changed AuthorityConfig::LEN. Fresh deployments
only — existing accounts (if any) must be re-initialized via close+initialize_authority.

fields.name: rights_merkle_root
docs: Merkle root of (holder_pubkey, rights_amount) pairs.
None = no rights for this cycle (or using legacy create_holder_rights).
Set via set_rights_merkle_root before or during open_cycle.
Holders claim rights by submitting a Merkle proof via claim_rights.

fields.name: rights_allocated
docs: FIX RA-8: Track cumulative rights allocated to prevent over-allocation beyond supply_cap

fields.name: rights_reserved_at_activation
docs: FIX H-R6-2 (round 7): Snapshot of unexercised rights at activation time.
This is the number of tokens that MUST remain protected from public buyers.
Frozen when activate_cycle runs. Prevents erosion as cycle.minted grows from public buys.

fields.name: rights_committed
docs: FIX H-R7-1 (round 8): Total rights committed via Merkle root.
Set in set_rights_merkle_root; ensures unclaimed Merkle rights are protected at activation.
If set, snapshot uses max(rights_allocated, rights_committed) to reserve space for all
potential claimants even if they didn't claim before rights_window_end.

types.name: OperatorType
docs: Disclosure-only field. Not enforced by the protocol — surfaced in UI.

fields.name: has_active_cycle
docs: FIX RA-1: Track whether a cycle is currently active to prevent concurrent cycles
